body_txt: A Stock Phrase said from a character who may often border on The Stoic (especially one who Hates Small Talk ) to one who is rather chatty or Motor Mouthed . Typically delivered as a punchline to the end of a long spiel or complaint made by the latter character. Also occasionally used as a " Shut Up, Hannibal! " A romantic variant has this line followed up by a "Shut Up" Kiss . If it's a battle, then they may express this by simply having them Talk to the Fist .
